visuals.title: Performance-Security-Energy Efficiency Trade-offs
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Performance-Security-Energy Efficiency Trade-offs
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Performance, Security and Energy Efficiency</text>

  <!-- Performance Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Performance
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Security Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Security
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Energy Efficiency Box -->
  <rect x="270" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Energy Efficiency
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting Arrows -->
  <line x1="150" y1="110" x2="160" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="260" y1="110" x2="270" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Performance Icon -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="180" r="25" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="20" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ⚡
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Security Icon -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="180" r="25" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="20" fill="white" opacity="0">
    🔒
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Energy Efficiency Icon -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="180" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="20" fill="white" opacity="0">
    🌿
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Bottom Text -->
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Optimized Systems Deliver All Three Benefits
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting Circle -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="280" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Synergy
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label: Potential Security Risks from Energy Saving
